Terms & Conditions

Welcome to Vasudev AI Chronicles. These Terms & Conditions govern your use of our website and services. By accessing or using this site, you agree to comply with and be bound by these terms. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our site.

1. Use of Content

All content on Vasudev AI Chronicles (articles, images, code snippets, etc.) is provided for informational and educational purposes only. We make reasonable efforts to provide accurate, up-to-date information, but we do not guarantee completeness or correctness. Your use of any information or materials on this site is at your own risk.

2. License & Copyright

All original content is © Vasudev AI Chronicles (2023–present). You may read, download, and share blog posts for personal, non-commercial use as long as you credit Vasudev AI Chronicles and do not alter the content. Republishing or redistributing our content without permission is prohibited. All trademarks, service marks, and logos displayed on the site are the property of their respective owners.

3. User Conduct

When using our site, you agree not to:

  • Violate any laws or infringe intellectual property rights.
  • Upload or disseminate harmful code (viruses, malware).
  • Collect or harvest personal data of others.
  • Interfere with the normal operation of the site (e.g. spam, hacking).

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access for any illegal or abusive behavior.

4. Disclaimer of Warranties

Vasudev AI Chronicles provides the site “as is” without any warranties. We disclaim all warranties of any kind, whether express or implied. We do not warrant that the site will be uninterrupted, error-free, or completely secure. While we strive for accuracy, we cannot be held responsible for errors or omissions in content.

5. Limitation of Liability

To the maximum extent permitted by law, Vasudev AI Chronicles and its authors will not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the site or any linked sites. This includes (but is not limited to) damages for loss of profits, data, or other intangible losses.

6. External Links

Our site may contain links to third-party websites (e.g., references to GitHub, OpenAI, Google). We provide these links for your convenience only and do not endorse or control them. We are not responsible for the content or practices of external sites. Visiting linked websites is at your own risk.

7. Advertisements and Affiliates

Some content may include affiliate links or sponsored content. We are not responsible for goods/services provided by advertisers or partners. Any transaction you make through affiliate links is solely between you and the merchant.

8. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold Vasudev AI Chronicles (and its affiliates) harmless from any claims or demands, including legal fees, arising out of your use of the site or violation of these Terms.

9. Privacy

Use of this site is also subject to our Privacy Policy. By using the site, you consent to our collection and use of information as described in the Privacy Policy.

10. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms & Conditions at any time without prior notice. Continued use of the site after changes implies acceptance of the new terms.

If you have any questions about these Terms & Conditions, please contact us at support@vasudevai.in or via the Contact Us page.

Clarity in Code. Stories in Tech. A premium futuristic developer journal built for the next generation of AI creators.
